3206580.name: Remorse
3206580.description: This game takes place in an ascending void where walls flank the sides and platforms of varying lengths rise upward. Players navigate their character using the left and right arrow keys to move and the spacebar to jump, ensuring they avoid being engulfed by the flames rising from below. The objective is to continuously climb onto new platforms as they appear, avoiding the flames that relentlessly pursue. The minimalist graphics and simple color palette enhance the game's focus on reflexes and timing. The soundtrack features an intense, pulsating beat that syncs with the rhythm of the gameplay, heightening the sense of urgency. Are you ready to test your skills in this vertical ascent?
